responses.buttonText: How do I get clean water?
How do I find the village?
How do I use the flashlight?
How do I use the map?

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Water: grab a bottle, fill it at the bank, drink. Tips are on your HUD.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Food: catch a fish, cook it at a fire, then eat. Tips are on your HUD.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Head out into Humble Abode and look for the main village - that's where the answers are.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Your flashlight cycles through four settings with E: first quarter brightness, then half, then full, then off again. I'll put the steps on your HUD.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Open your phone and launch the Map app - it'll walk you through the rest from there. Tip's on your HUD.
